name: Loogamon

signature_move.name: Howling Fire
signature_move.description: Shoots flames imbued with magical power from its mouth

description: A Demon Beast Digimon that is, because of the outdated Interface on its brow, presumed to be an experimental " Prototype Digimon " from before Digimon were discovered. It is said that the data of the warg from real-world mythology is embedded within the deepest parts of its Digicore , and it exhibits behavior so violent you would not expect it from a Child. It may look like a cute puppy at first glance, but those who approach it carelessly will find themselves on the receiving end of a fierce counterattack. Its nature is such that it will recognize those who can control it as its master, and despite being difficult to tame, it can become a reliable companion if one is able to build a relationship of trust with it. Its Special Moves are shooting flames imbued with magical power from its mouth ( Howling Fire ), and biting with its sharp fangs as it spins ( Spiral Bite ).
